expected_outcome: Proficient JavaScript developer capable of writing modern ES6+ scripts, handling asynchronous flows, manipulating the DOM, and designing interactive dynamic web applications.

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily coding basic functions and conditionals on sites like Edabit or freeCodeCamp.

mini_project.title: Temperature Converter
mini_project.description: A web interface script that converts Celsius to Fahrenheit and Kelvin dynamically based on user input.

phases.milestone: Mastery of JavaScript syntax rules, variables, control flow structures, and basic debugging.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing data sorting algorithms and array mapping utilities.

mini_project.title: Shopping Cart Calculator
mini_project.description: Build an algorithm that processes a list of products, filters out of stock items, sums prices, and applies taxes/coupons.

phases.milestone: Proficient in manipulating data collections using array iterators and configuring nested objects.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily building dynamic interactive layout widgets.

mini_project.title: Interactive Todo App
mini_project.description: Create a fully functional interactive Todo application with checkboxes, filters, item edits, and state persistence in LocalStorage.

phases.milestone: Capable of building interactive UI states that respond to user clicks, keys, and persist selections across refreshes.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing HTTP fetch requests and structuring classes.

mini_project.title: Weather API Application
mini_project.description: Fetch real-time weather details from a public API, map current conditions to custom background graphics, and handle loading states.

phases.milestone: Mastered asynchronous events flow, fetching server endpoints, and Object-Oriented JavaScript configurations.

major_projects.title: Dynamic Music Player Board
major_projects.description: A web audio player interface with play, pause, volume bars, playlist queue loading, and local progress storage using classes and audio Web APIs.

major_projects.title: Kanban Task Board with Drag & Drop
major_projects.description: Create an interactive task dashboard showing multiple columns where items can be moved, edited, deleted, and synchronized with localStorage.
